name: debug-verify
description: Debug verification plugin — validates debugging hypotheses against real data using Advocate + Challenger dual-agent Kapasi Loop. Auto-triggers on debug plan detection, integrates with plan-review for fix plan validation. v1.1 adds Pre-Advocate Classifier (Step 1.5) and Tool Coverage Audit. v1.1.1 generalizes tool categories so MCP and Bash CLI (sqlcmd/psql/curl/etc.) are equivalent fallbacks within each category.
